nasb.text: May he vindicate the afflicted of the people, Save the children of the needy And crush the oppressor.

esv.text: May he defend the cause of the poor of the people, give deliverance to the children of the needy, and crush the oppressor!

cnv.text: 他必為民間的困苦人伸冤， 拯救貧窮人， 粉碎那欺壓人的。

ccb.text: 愿他保护百姓中受苦的人， 拯救贫穷的人，打倒欺压者。

csbs.text: 愿他为子民中的困苦人施行审判， 拯救贫穷人的儿女，压碎那欺压者。
